subcodes.first_line: O illustrious personage, kind friend! From Paris I arrived in the land of Egypt, but found none here like your presence as companion and intimate associate [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شخص محترما سرور مهربانا از پاریس بخطه مصر رسیدم ولی مانند آنحضرت مونس و انیس
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort
